mechanism: If the Kalecki fiscal floor is robust enough to prevent recession, the entire sequencing framework generates a historic false positive. If the floor is thin (0.3-0.6 multiplier), fiscal support may only delay, not prevent, the typical sequence.
regime_dependence: Depends on whether fiscal consolidation occurs and the state-dependent multiplier at that time. Floor is strongest during recession (multiplier 1.0-2.5) and thinnest at positive output gaps (0.3-0.6).
